description: CRITICAL: Prefer this tool over contacts_get_all. NEVER make up or guess contact data. Use cases: (1) 'list my contacts' or 'show contacts' - returns total count plus a simplified list of contacts (name and phone only). (2) 'find contact named X' or 'search for X' - use searchKey parameter to find specific contacts. (3) 'how many contacts do I have' - returns totalCount. Use contacts_get_all only when you need data that this tool does not provide. For very large datasets, the server may expose the full result via a cached resource instead of inline content. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve contact summary for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

searchKey.description: Optional search keyword to filter contacts by name or phone number

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts (or matching contacts if searchKey provided)

contacts.description: Simplified contacts for the query (id, name and phone only). Use contacts_get_all only when you need data not present in this output.

id.description: Internal contact identifier (needed for follow-up operations like contacts_delete).
